explanation: I've created a complete support operations dashboard focused on open tickets and weekly performance. It includes current ticket counts, response times, team performance, and category breakdowns to help you manage support operations effectively.

widgets.title: Support Operations Dashboard
widgets.subtitle: This week's open tickets and team performance

widgets.title: Key Insight
widgets.subtitle: Monitor billing-related tickets closely — they typically have 2x longer resolution times. Consider dedicated billing support specialists to improve response times and customer satisfaction.

quickActions.label: Add Ticket Priority Breakdown
quickActions.prompt: Add a chart showing tickets by priority level (low, medium, high, urgent)

quickActions.label: Show Channel Performance
quickActions.prompt: Add analysis of support channels (email, chat, phone, portal)

quickActions.label: Create Agent Performance View
quickActions.prompt: Show individual agent metrics and workload distribution
